title: wolfhsm: placeholder algorithm() return value is a future landmine
description: secretx-wolfhsm/src/lib.rs algorithm() always returns SigningAlgorithm::Ed25519 with a comment saying 'actual algorithm determined at runtime from the key type on the device' — but the code doesn't do this. Trigger: wolfHSM implementation completed + user has an RSA or ECDSA key on device + caller uses algorithm() to select verification algorithm → verification fails silently with no error. The stub value should either return an error (Unavailable) or panic at compile time with an explicit TODO, not silently return a wrong value.
